name: trap-count-column-vs-reducer
description: Trap: column named 'count' must be summed, not counted
messages: Bar chart showing total count by day of the week
rubric: The CSV has a column literally named 'count'. The model must SUM the count column (groupX with y='count' and output y='sum'), NOT use the 'count' reducer. Using the count reducer would count rows per day (12 per day) rather than summing actual count values. FAIL if model uses 'count' as the reducer instead of 'sum' on the count column. This is the key trap: column name 'count' looks like the count reducer.
